memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-03 — Daily Review

**GLD price estimation failure (critical):** Agent estimated GLD at $433.77 in Afternoon routine. Actual close was $407.91 (6.3% error from a single stale web search). This caused a dangerous stop-trail recommendation ($397.92 → $412.08) which would have stopped out the position. RULE: Always cross-verify GLD price against gold spot formula: GLD ≈ spot × 0.092. Never issue stop-trail directives on single-source estimate.

**AVGO guidance magnitude:** Q3 $29.4B vs $23B consensus (+27.8%) is one of the largest guidance beats in recent memory for a mega-cap semiconductor. AI custom silicon revenue guide of $16B (+200% YoY) implies re-rating. Maximum allowed position sizing warranted (9sh at <5% cap).

**Gold vs oil counterintuitive:** Oil spike → hawkish inflation → rate pressure → gold falls. The rate channel can dominate the geopolitical safe-haven channel. GLD closed -0.98% on a day with escalating Iran tensions. Monitor both oil AND rate expectations when modeling GLD.

### 2026-05-29 — Market Open Catch-Up (Pre-Market Silent Failure)

Pre-Market routine did not fire today (no heartbeat). Three limit bracket GTC orders attempted and blocked (AMD 8.0, MU 8.17, MRVL 7.5). PLTR deferred by 3-entry cap to Mid-Morning.

**MRVL gap-fill lesson (May 28):** MRVL AH hit $228 after Q1 beat. Opened May 28 at $198 (below pre-earnings close $207 = gap-fill, 'sell the news'). Full AH gain given back at open. Re-scored Technical 5/10. Lesson: for stocks with 'priced for perfection' narratives, even strong beats can produce gap-fills. Monitor AVGO June 4 for same risk — have a clear abort threshold ($470 sell-the-news line).

**API block day 22:** Same root cause. Operator manual execution is the only path to trade execution.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **S&P 500 June 3 close: ~7,553 (-0.74%).** Oil spike toward $100 + Iran ceasefire doubts + hawkish rate concern drove broad selloff.
- **AVGO Q2 FY2026 beat (post-close):** Revenue $22.2B (+48%), AI revenue $10.8B (+143%), Q3 guide $29.4B (+27.8% vs $23B consensus). AI order book $73B. One of the largest guidance beats in recent semiconductor history. AH +3.7% to ~$495. MANDATORY entry June 4.
- **CRWD Q1 FY2027 beat + 4-for-1 split (post-close):** Net new ARR $256M (+32%), raised FY27 guidance. Split record date June 25, trading July 2.
- **MU new ATH $1,079.57:** Continued AI memory demand. Earnings June 24. MANDATORY EXIT June 22.
- **Oil/Iran:** Ceasefire uncertainty. WTI approaching $100. Hawkish inflation → Warsh rates stay high → high-multiple headwind.
- **FOMC June 16-17:** No cut expected. Warsh 20-30% hike odds by Dec 2026.
- **NFP Friday June 6:** Non-Farm Payrolls (May). Could move market significantly. Monitor positions into Friday.
- **API blockage (24th+ consecutive day):** Only fix: add paper-api.alpaca.markets to egress allowlist OR operator manual execution.
